points.title: Member Center
points.rule_block_upgrade_body: Your rank is determined by lifetime spending. After an order completes, if you meet the threshold your level upgrades automatically.
points.rule_block_earn_body: After an order completes, points are issued using your tier multiplier. Formula: order amount × tier multiplier (rounded down to a whole number).
points.rule_block_redeem_body: Every %s points deduct HK$ 1.00. At checkout you can enter how many points to use.
points.max_level_message: You are already at the highest tier—thank you for your support.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.password_intro: Update your login password to keep your account secure.
settings.password_setup_intro: You are currently signed in with Firebase. Set a local password once to also enable email/password sign in.
settings.social_intro: After linking, you can use Google%s or GitHub to sign in to the same Gundam Mall account.
settings.firebase_email_only_hint: Your account may currently use email/password login only. You can click a provider on this page directly, and the system will open an authorization popup to complete social verification and linking. If the popup is blocked, please allow popups in your browser.

payment.title: Wallet Balance
payment.wallet_hint: You can use your wallet to deduct part of the amount at checkout (if you choose to use it).

addresses_page.title: Manage Shipping Addresses
addresses_page.subtitle: Save and manage shipping addresses for faster checkout.
addresses_page.empty: No addresses have been added yet

orders.title: Order History
orders.subtitle: Review your orders and payment status.

addresses_js.load_error: An error occurred while loading address data
addresses_js.alert_required: Please fill in all required fields
addresses_js.alert_village_or_street: Please fill in the estate/estate name or street address
addresses_js.save_error: An error occurred while saving the address
addresses_js.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this address?
addresses_js.delete_error: An error occurred while deleting the address
addresses_js.default_error: An error occurred while setting the default address

firebase_auth_js.cred_email_missing: Unable to get voucher or email to link account.
firebase_auth_js.email_binds_provider: This email is already linked to %1$s. Please sign in in the next popup to link your %2$s account.
firebase_auth_js.fb_disabled: This email has been bound to Facebook. Please enable Facebook login (environment settings) on this site and try again.
firebase_auth_js.password_then_github: This email has been registered with a password. Please log in with your email password before connecting to GitHub in Firebase/Account Settings.
firebase_auth_js.github_merge_ok: The connection is successful! Your GitHub accounts are now merged.
firebase_auth_js.github_auto_unsupported: The login method of this email cannot automatically connect to GitHub through the pop-up window. Please log in using a registered method instead or contact the administrator.
firebase_auth_js.github_in_use: This GitHub account is already linked to a separate Firebase account.
firebase_auth_js.email_missing_link: Unable to retrieve email and automatically link accounts.
firebase_auth_js.password_then_oauth: This email was registered with a password. Please sign in with your email/password first, then link %s in Firebase/Account Settings.
firebase_auth_js.sign_in_first: Please log in using the registered login method before linking this third-party account.
firebase_auth_js.link_ok: Account link successful! You can log in this way in the future.
firebase_auth_js.oauth_in_use: This third-party account is already bound to another user.

firebase_link_js.need_login: No Firebase session is active yet. The system will first open an authorization popup to sign in, then continue linking.
firebase_link_js.popup_blocked: Please allow browser pop-ups to complete authorization.
firebase_link_js.already_linked: This login method has been bound.
firebase_link_js.credential_in_use: Error: This %s account has been bound by another mall user, please try another account.
firebase_link_js.email_in_use: This email is already used in another account. Please use the account linking process.
